rationale: Acting on Review 1's single finding produces the better PR: the `simp` (not `simp only`) in Deck.fiberHomeomorph at the shown location *is* non-trivial (unfolds preimage/eq_comm + map_proj and implicitly pulls Set.mem_singleton_iff), and changing it to the suggested explicit form improves robustness exactly along the proof-quality axis. Review 2's approve misses this real, grounded issue (visible in the diff) that a maintainer would want fixed; the difference is neither stylistic nor contested.
